caribbean.headline: Caribbean Storm Hits Martinique
caribbean.paragraph: Martinique is experiencing 11 kt winds and 2.3 ft wave heights with a 100% rain probability, while nearby Cartagena has 10 kt winds. I expect these conditions to impact ports in the Lesser Antilles, particularly Martinique, due to the high rain probability and moderate wind speeds.

mediterranean.headline: Mediterranean Winds Rise
mediterranean.paragraph: Mykonos is experiencing 22 kt winds with 5.6 ft wave heights and a 38% rain probability, while nearby ports like Istanbul have significantly lighter conditions with 11 kt winds. As I monitor the region, I note that these winds are strong enough to warrant caution for small craft, but do not meet the threshold for a Small Craft Advisory, and the less than 10% rain probability in other areas of the Mediterranean will lead to mostly dry conditions in those locations, however this is not applicable to Mykonos which has a 38% rain probability.
